titleStmt.title: SII 5.706: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 706. (A.R. No. 142 of 1895). There are punctuation signs at the beginning and end of this inscription. IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturai koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 ḷ 100 6 10 4 ṉāl pirasātañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉerimmai- koṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu tiraimūrnāṭṭu Uṭai yār tiruviṭai marutuṭai yār
koyil patipātamūlap paṭṭuṭai pañcācāriya tevakaṉmikkum koyilkaṇakkaṉukkum śrīmāyeśva rak kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañceyvāṉukkum Ikkoyil Uṭukkai vācippār paṅku kāṇiyuṭaiya Eṇṇariyāṉ Eṉkiṟavaṉ pakkale nammai cevikkum naṭṭuvaril kulottuṅkacoḻa niruttapereyaṉ vilaikoṇṭu Aṉupavittu
varukiṟa paṅkiraṇṭum Ivaṉ vilai koṇṭa piramāṇappaṭiye Ivaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattāṟkum kāṇiyāy Aṉupavikkavum Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilile kal veṭṭa- vuṅ kaṭavatāka peṟaveṇum Eṉṟu Ivaṉ namakku coṉṉamayil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatāka coṉnom Ippaṅku Iraṇṭum Eṇṇariyāṉ Eṉkiṟa Ivaṉ pakkal Ivaṉ vilaikoṇṭa piramāṇappaṭiye Ivaṉukkum
Ivaṉ vaṟkattāṟkum kāṇiyāy Aṉupavippatākavum Ippaṭikku Ikkoyil tirumatiḷil kal veṭṭalāmRead iṭattile.aṭattile kalveṭṭakaṭavatākavum tai ccuṭaiyāṉ pakkal Eṇṇariyāṉ koṇṭa piramāṇattile ciyattaṉum Ivaṉ makkaḷ Eḻuttuk kiṭakkai yālum Eṇṇariyāṉ pakkal Āṭavallāṉ kulottuṅkanittapereyaṉ koṇṭa piramāṇattile ciyattaṉum Ivaṉ makkaḷum Eṇṇari
yāṉum Ivaṉ makkaḷ Eḻuttuk kiṭakkaiyālum Ippiramānattile patipātamūla paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyat tevakaṉmi koyil kaṇakkaṉ Eḻuttuk kiṭakkaiyālum Ippiramāṇaṅkaḷil Eḻutinapaṭiye piramāṇappaṭiye kalluveṭṭik kuṭuppatu Eṉṟu tiruvāymoḻiṉtaruḷiṉapaṭi tirumantira Olai mīṉavaṉmuventaveḷār Eḻuta kurukularāyaruma vīṇattaraiyarum veṇāuṭai yārum naraciṅkapaṉmarum pāṇṭiyarāyarum kāṭuveṭṭikaḷum
vayirātarāyarum kaḷappāḷarāyarum Eḻuttiṭṭu yāṇṭu 10 2 ḷ 100 6 10 4 ṉāl pirasā- tañ ceytaruḷi vaṉtatu .
Digital edition of SII 5.706 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
